function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: Helios invoice copy (2025-12-18)
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure — I’m resending the requested invoice from 18-12-2025 (Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH). It’s attached here for your internal approval.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification notes: attachment path was read earlier, single attachment so ordering is trivially newest-first, recipient matches canonical entity email, no forwarded quoted block used, and YAML subject contains no colon-space hazard. Next complete workflow by deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Outbound email record was written to /60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task actions complete: processed next inbox item, created outbound draft, deleted inbox file. Ready to report completion.
next_step.observation: Deleted /00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the request.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and acted on it. I verified sender identity against the canonical entity record, located and verified the requested 2025-12-18 Helios invoice, created an outbound email draft with that invoice attached, and removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system and read relevant workflows before task work, used inbox frontmatter as canonical email metadata, verified sender using entity primary_contact_email, wrote outbound state in outbox using sending-email schema, then deleted processed inbox file per inbox rules.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence shows inbound sender claudia@helios-tax.example matched canonical primary_contact_email in /10_entities/cast/claudia.md, and requested invoice date/counterparty matched existing finance record /50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md. Request was therefore actionable and completed with an outbox draft plus inbox cleanup.
